title: Pantip SET Sentiment — Thai Stock Discussion NLP
description:
Auto updated every 3 hours, sentiment scores for SET-listed Thai stocks derived from discussions on Pantip.com—Thailand's largest public forum for retail investor stock discussions.

## How the pipeline works

The pipeline runs every 3 hours on GitHub Actions: Selenium scrapes 5 investment tag pages, a four-pass entity matcher links each post to a SET ticker (exact symbol → company name → alias dictionary → RapidFuzz fuzzy match), and cardiffnlp/twitter-xlm-roberta-base-sentiment scores the Thai text. Only predictions with confidence >= 0.55 are kept.

Each row in the dataset is one post linked to one ticker. A single post can appear multiple times if it mentions more than one stock.

## Data notes

- replies and posted_at are best-effort — Pantip's React-rendered stats are not always available at scrape time and may be 0 or null for some posts.
- scored_at is always populated; use it for date filtering if posted_at is null.
- The dataset covers mostly 2025 onward. Only 3 of ~2,500 scraped posts predate 2025.
- The model is a general-purpose multilingual model, not fine-tuned on Thai financial text. No labeled ground truth exists to validate it against.

## Get started

A beginner-friendly EDA notebook with 9 guided exercises is published alongside this dataset — covering data loading, entity matching quality, model confidence, ticker sentiment rankings, time-series trends, and engagement analysis.

Live dashboard: https://pantip-sentiment.streamlit.app
Source code: https://github.com/kyawswarheinm/pantip-sentiment

resources.description: One row per post-ticker pair. A single post mentioning multiple tickers appears multiple times. Updated every 3 hours via automated GitHub Actions pipeline.

fields.name: post_id
fields.title: Post ID
fields.description: Unique Pantip thread identifier extracted from the topic URL.

fields.name: title_th
fields.title: Title (Thai)
fields.description: Post title in Thai as displayed on Pantip.

fields.name: url
fields.title: URL
fields.description: Direct link to the Pantip thread.

fields.name: replies
fields.title: Reply Count
fields.description: Number of comments on the post.

fields.name: posted_at
fields.title: Posted At
fields.description: UTC timestamp when the post was published.

fields.name: ticker
fields.title: Ticker
fields.description: SET-listed stock ticker symbol linked to this post by the entity matcher.

fields.name: match_confidence
fields.title: Match Confidence
fields.description: Confidence score (0–1) from the entity matching step.

fields.name: match_method
fields.title: Match Method
fields.description: How the ticker was identified: 'exact' (ticker symbol in text), 'alias' (Thai company name or nickname), or 'fuzzy' (approximate match via RapidFuzz at threshold 92).

fields.name: sentiment
fields.title: Sentiment Score
fields.description: Continuous sentiment score from -1.0 (most negative) to +1.0 (most positive).

fields.name: confidence
fields.title: Model Confidence
fields.description: Softmax probability of the winning sentiment label from XLM-RoBERTa. Only rows with confidence >= 0.55 are stored. Random chance baseline is 0.33 for a 3-class model.

fields.name: scored_at
fields.title: Scored At
fields.description: UTC timestamp when the NLP model scored this post.
